name: USS PC-1241 (PC-1241)
events: 16 Jun 1944 USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) departed New Orleans for the Panama Canal Zone. She was escorted out until the morning of the 17th by USS PC-1241 (Lt. E.E. Weingarden, USNR). (1)
31 Aug 1944 USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) departed New Orleans for the Panama Canal Zone.
Total bombing and attack restrictions were in place, 30 miles ahead, 60 miles behind and 15 miles on either side.
Escort was to be provided until point 'C' by USS PC-1241 (Lt. E.E. Weingarden, USNR). The remainder of the passage was to be made unescorted. (2)
